M0445_PRESS_ULCER (M0445) Pressure Ulcer Does patient have pressure ulcer? 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0450_NBR_PRU_STG1 (M0450) Number Stage 1 Pressure Ulcers Number of pressure ulcers, stage 1. 00 = Zero
01 = one
02 = Two
03 = Three
04 = Four or more CHAR 2 x x
M0450_NBR_PRU_STG2 (M0450) Number Stage 2 Pressure Ulcers Number of pressure ulcers, stage 2. 00 = Zero
01 = one
02 = Two
03 = Three
04 = Four or more CHAR 2 x x
M0450_NBR_PRU_STG3 (M0450) Number Stage 3 Pressure
